rationale: The cited paper (10.1509/jmr.11.0466) directly studies cross-channel effects of traditional/display/paid search on online and offline sales with AdStock and endogeneity controls, which closely matches the citing paper’s core focus on multimedia effects across online/in-store channels and similar modeling concerns. The citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior multimedia/cross-channel work beyond single-brand settings, so this citation is likely substantive rather than a generic mention.
